case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. NANCY MULLANE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: NON-ACTIVE MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 61364594) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
